## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Benchmark or test

## Testing

How did you verify this works? Commands run, results observed.

- [ ] `cargo test -- --test-threads=1` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] `cd python && python -m pytest tests/ -q` passes (if Python changes)

## Breaking changes

Any user-visible API, config, or behavior changes? List them.

## Related issues

Closes #N / Related to #N
